assessment.note: He names a self-limiting pattern — not being explicit about desired opportunities — which signals stalled growth and mildly reduced agency.

new_queue.label: Wanted opportunities
new_queue.name: What opportunities have you not been explicit about wanting?
new_queue.description: Turns his self-identified pattern into a concrete aspiration he can name clearly.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff ask
new_queue.name: What would you stop doing if you wanted to spend more time on strategic ownership?
new_queue.description: Forces a real tradeoff between tactical delivery and senior-level work, making the cost of change explicit.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to start first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete choice Ahmed will make before the next check-in.
